description: Achieve 100% feature parity with Vant Web for core components. Each component must match Vant's Props, Events, Animations, CSS Variables, and Composables.

rules: Read VANT_ACCEPTANCE.md first - it defines the acceptance criteria
Each story must achieve 100% feature parity, not just 'critical gaps'
Props: ALL Vant props must be supported (or documented as N/A with reason)
Events: ALL events with correct timing (opened/closed AFTER animation)
Animations: Vue Transition + slide/fade CSS animations required
CSS Variables: No hardcoded values, use --van-* variables
If a feature cannot be supported in Lynx, document WHY in component README
Use lynxbase skill to query Lynx APIs for alternatives
parityChecklist: 1. Fetch Vant source: curl {component}.tsx, shared.ts, index.less, types.ts
2. Props: List ALL props from Vant, implement each one
3. Events: List ALL events, ensure correct timing (after animation for opened/closed)
4. Animations: Implement Vue Transition with slide-top/bottom/left/right + fade
5. CSS Variables: Create index.less with all --van-{component}-* variables
6. Composables: Implement useLockScroll, useLazyRender, useGlobalZIndex as needed
7. Slots: Support all slots including overlay-content
8. Close Icon: Use Icon component with 4 positions (not hardcoded ×)
10. Browser verify: Test all props/events work correctly
11. Update README: Document any Lynx limitations in '与 Vant 的差异' section
12. Remove parity report comment: Replace with full implementation

userStories.title: Popup: 100% feature parity
acceptanceCriteria: Fetch: curl Vant Popup.tsx, shared.ts, index.less from GitHub

Props: Implement ALL 24 props (show, position, round, closeable, closeIcon, closeIconPosition, duration, transition, transitionAppear, overlay, closeOnClickOverlay, overlayClass, overlayStyle, overlayProps, zIndex, lockScroll, lazyRender, destroyOnClose, beforeClose, closeOnPopstate, safeAreaInsetTop, safeAreaInsetBottom, teleport, iconPrefix)
Events: All 8 events (update:show, open, close, opened, closed, click-overlay, click-close-icon, keydown) - opened/closed must fire AFTER animation
Animations: Vue <Transition> with slide-top/bottom/left/right for position, fade for center
Icon: Use Icon component for close button, not hardcoded text
Composables: Implement or stub useLockScroll, useLazyRender, useGlobalZIndex
Browser verify: All 5 positions animate correctly
Browser verify: opened event fires after animation completes
Browser verify: duration prop changes animation speed
Update component README with any Lynx limitations
Remove the parity report comment block at top of file
Commit: feat(popup): 100% feature parity with Vant

Browser verify: All button types/sizes render correctly

Events: confirm, cancel, open, close, opened, closed, update:show, click-overlay

userStories.title: Final verification and cleanup
acceptanceCriteria: Run pnpm build in examples/vant-lynx - must pass
Run pnpm typecheck if available - must pass
Browser verify: Open demo page, all 10 components render
Verify: No hardcoded colors/sizes remain (grep for #fff, #000, px values)
Verify: All components have README with Lynx limitations documented
